calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
Arnold W. Evje, II appeared with plaintiff M. Amin, who was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Julius Countryman.
The Court takes Judicial Notice of the Notice of Time & Place of Trial served February 22, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or
Quit dated 12/18/07---------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff M. Amin and against defendant JULIUS COUNTRYMAN as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant JULIUS COUNTRYMAN Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $733.00. Costs in the amount of 195.00, for a total judgment of $928.00.
Plaintiff M. Amin is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 48 Sixth Street, #10, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Off Calendar
